title: clerodendrum nuxioides
intro: Clerodendrum nuxioides, also known as the Japanese passionflower or mountain rose, is a species of flowering plant native to Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Clerodendrum nuxioides are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
